description: Content Policies are used in conjunction with Access Policies to determine how user input is handled. They define the system’s response to problematic or sensitive inputs and can enforce actions such as warning the user, redacting sensitive information, raising alerts, and other protective measures.

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

importHash.description: The hash of the structure used to compare with new import version.
importHash.title: importHash

importLabel.description: The user-defined import label that allows the system to group resources from the same import operation.
importLabel.title: importLabel

moderations.description: The list of moderations to take when the user has access to the provider.
moderations.title: moderations

name.description: The internal reference name of the object. It is a sanitized version of Friendly Name if empty.
name.title: name

propagate.description: Propagates the object to all child namespaces. This is always true.
propagate.title: propagate

type.description: Choose on what the content policy should apply.
type.title: type

updateTime.description: Last update date of the object.
updateTime.title: updateTime

title: ContentPolicy
